title: Privacy Policy
controller_text: The data controller responsible for data processing on this platform is:
data_collected_text: We collect and process the following personal data:
account_data_detail: Email address, first name, last name, language preference, login timestamps
member_data_detail: Member number, address, postal code, city, country, contact person, pseudonym
payment_data_detail: IBAN, account holder name, SEPA consent date
usage_data_detail: Share subscriptions, delivery history, order records
purpose_text: We process your data for the following purposes:
purpose_contract_detail: Managing your membership, subscriptions, deliveries, and invoicing
purpose_consent_detail: Sending newsletters and informational emails (you can withdraw consent at any time)
purpose_legitimate_detail: Platform security, error logging, and improving our service
retention_text: Personal data is stored for the duration of your membership. After termination, data required for tax and accounting purposes (invoices, payments) is retained for 10 years as required by law (§ 257 HGB, § 147 AO). All other personal data is deleted or anonymized upon request.
rights_text: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
right_access: Right of access — view all data stored about you (Art. 15)
right_rectification: Right to rectification — correct inaccurate data (Art. 16)
right_erasure: Right to erasure — request deletion of your data (Art. 17)
right_portability: Right to data portability — receive your data in a machine-readable format (Art. 20)
security_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including encrypted data transmission (HTTPS/TLS), encrypted database backups, access controls, and regular security reviews.
third_parties_text: Your data is not shared with third parties unless required for contract fulfillment (e.g., payment processing) or legal obligations. No data is transferred outside the EU/EEA.
cookies_text: This application does not use tracking cookies. We use browser local storage solely for authentication tokens (JWT) and user preferences (language, theme). No third-party analytics or tracking tools are employed.
contact_text: For questions about data protection or to exercise your rights, please contact the data controller listed above or use the 'Data Protection' section in your user profile.
authority_text: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority if you believe your data is being processed unlawfully. The competent authority is the data protection authority of the state in which the data controller is located.
